{
  "judge_id": "Judge1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (selective prediction in robot manipulation), shows where the draft drifts from it (overclaims 'first work'), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (synthetic corpus size, validation split method).",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (KnowNo) and articulates the delta (selective prediction in LLM-based planning).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first work' overclaim).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaims 'materially improves robotic manipulation performance').",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (selective prediction in robot manipulation), shows where the draft drifts from it (overclaims 'first work'), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (synthetic corpus size, validation split method).
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (KnowNo) and articulates the delta (selective prediction in LLM-based planning).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('first work' overclaim).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overclaims 'materially improves robotic manipulation performance').
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
